titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NLS Adv. MS 15.1.18, no. 11

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=96 status=live modified=2017-01-30 19:27:58.891687+00 | translation moa=97 status=live modified=2016-06-07 09:13:32.100401+00

p.cl: R . dei gratia Sancti Andree episcopus  Omnibus Sancte matris ecclesie filiis  Salutem ∙

Sciant
omnes tam posteri quam presentes  nos concessisse ⁊ episcopali autoritate confirm
asse  Priori Sancti Andree ∙ fratribus que ibidem deo seruientibus . omnes partes oblacionum altaris
excepta septima . que de iure conpetit episcopo . liberas ⁊ quietas . ⁊ ab omni exactione
inmunes .

His testibus . Willelmo episcopo morauie . Osberto abbate de Gedd’ . Aiulfo decano .
Magistro Andrea . Magistro herberto . Iohanne nepote episcopi . Magistro Thoma . Adam capellano

div.p: Robert, by the grace of God bishop of St Andrews, to all sons of holy mother Church, Greeting: Let all people know, future as well as present, that we have granted and by episcopal authority made firm to the prior St Andrews, and to the brethren serving God there, all parts of the offerings of the altar, except the seventh, which by right belongs to the bishop, free and quit, and exempt from every exaction. With these witnesses: William the bishop of Moray, Osbert the abbot of Jedburgh, Aiulf the dean, Master Andrew, Master Herbert, John the bishop's nephew, Mater Thomas, Adam the chaplain.
